scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix mobile
scripts.build: npm install --prefix server && PUPPETEER_CACHE_DIR=./server/.cache/puppeteer npx puppeteer browsers install chrome@127.0.6533.88
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run server" "npm run client" "npm run mobile"
scripts.deploy: git add . && git commit -m 'Update: production sync' && git push
scripts.deploy:msg: git add . && git commit && git push
